sections.paragraph:
σφοδρός, α, όν (Thu., Pla, X.; LXX; TestNapht 6:4; TestSol 10:37 C) pert. to being excessive, vehement (s. prec. entry) χάλαζα … λίαν μεγάλην (read: μεγάλη) σφοδρά a violent hailstorm AcPl Ha 5, 7.—DELG s.v. σφεδανός.

Thu Thu , V b.c.—List 5

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

TestNapht TestNapht = Testament of Naphthali, s. Test12Patr—List 2

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

prec. prec. = preceding

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 980
